ai_summary: A full-screen celestial hero section featuring an animated orrery with orbiting planets. The component uses CSS-driven orbital animations to create a cosmic atmosphere with layered glyph elements. Designed as a visually striking landing page hero for SaaS, media, or developer-focused products requiring a space-themed aesthetic with depth and motion.
